◎片　　名　Extreme

◎简　　介  

　　Once again, another visually stunning IMAX movie, with little to hold it together. We see surfing the biggest waves, climbing the tallest mountains, windsurfing big waves, climbing rock faces, and snowboarding.We hear inane comments from many of the above "athletes".Overall, it was painful to pay full movie price for a 45 minute load of eye candy.
